daily_summary.headline: Exciting Day for Space Launches and Aurora Viewing

top_events.title: Spectrum | Onward and Upward
top_events.description: Second test flight of the Isar Spectrum launch vehicle, carrying 5 cubesats and 1 non-separable experiment as part of ESA's “Boost!” program.

top_events.title: Long March 2C | Unknown Payload
top_events.description: Launch of Long March 2C with an unknown payload, possibly including SuperView Neo 2-05 & 06.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-17
top_events.description: Launch of 25 Starlink satellites for SpaceX's internet constellation.
top_events.action: Watch the official webcast on SpaceX's website
